steps.title: Fastest path: graph or solve the equation
steps.content:
Type the equation into Desmos as written:
$$(x-16)(x-12)(x+7)(x+13)=0$$Graph it and use the visible intercept, root, or vertex the question asks for. The requested value is $16$ or $12$.

steps.title: Use the zero product property
steps.content: The equation is already factored: $$(x-16)(x-12)(x+7)(x+13)=0.$$ A product is $0$ when at least one factor is $0$.

steps.title: Find all solutions
steps.content: Set each factor equal to $0$: $$x=16, \quad x=12, \quad x=-7, \quad x=-13.$$

steps.title: Choose a positive solution
steps.content: The question asks for a positive solution, not all solutions. The positive solutions are $16$ and $12$, so either 16 or 12 is valid.
